scripts.install-all: npm install --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix api install --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix database install --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix frontend install --ignore-scripts
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: npx dotenv -e .env.development -- npx vercel dev --cwd api --yes --listen 3000
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix api && npm run type-check --prefix frontend
